title: Upload document
subtitle: Drop Arabic or English business documents to extract and index them. PDF, JPG, and PNG up to 50 MB.

dropzone.idle: Drop files or click to browse
dropzone.hint: PDF · JPG · PNG — up to 50 MB each

staging.heading: Review before uploading
staging.count: {count, plural, one {# file staged} other {# files staged}}
staging.upload: Upload {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}
staging.duplicateTitle: Same filename and size as another staged file

errors.mime: Only PDF, JPG, and PNG files are supported.
errors.size: File is too large. Maximum size is 50 MB.

indicator.processing: {count, plural, one {# upload processing} other {# uploads processing}}
